fields.title: Generate For Climates
fields.description: Controls the world generation climate categories that this biome can spawn for. Each entry is an array of [climate_name, weight] where climate_name is 'medium', 'warm', 'lukewarm', 'cold', or 'frozen'.

An array of any size containing arrays of exactly two elements. For each contained array, the first element is a climate category string ('medium', 'warm', 'lukewarm', 'cold', or 'frozen'). The second element is a positive integer for how much that entry is weighted relative to other entries.
fields.title: Hills Transformation
Mutate Transformation
fields.description: What biome to switch to when converting to a mutated biome

fields.title: River Transformation
fields.description: What biome to switch to when converting to a river biome (if not the Vanilla 'river' biome)

fields.title: Shore Transformation
fields.description: What biome to switch to when adjacent to an ocean biome

note: This is a pre-Caves and Cliffs component and is unused for custom biomes.
description: Controls how this biome is instantiated (and then potentially modified) during world generation of the overworld.
title: Biome Overworld Generation Rules
